title: solidago rigida subsp. glabrata
intro: Solidago rigida subsp. glabrata, also known as stiff goldenrod, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the aster family, native to North America. The medicinal properties of Solidago rigida subsp. glabrata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Solidago rigida subsp. glabrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
